name: Divine Rapier
description: So powerful, it cannot have a single owner.

abilities.name: Transmute
abilities.description: Toggle on to gain bonus spell damage amplification. Cooldown: 6. Mana Cost: 0. Spell Damage Amplification Bonus: 25%. Attack Damage Bonus: 250.

abilities.name: Everlasting
abilities.description: The rapier belongs to the player that purchased it, and is muted when held by allies. The purchasing player can manually drop or stash the Rapier freely at any time.
